LanguageData.AM_AluminumSplint.description: A medical fracture splint, which needs to be used in conjunction with other items in the medical kit. It is not very useful if it is the only one.
LanguageData.AM_AluminumSplint.label: aluminum splint
LanguageData.AM_BakingThermometer.description: Some thermometers for cooking, maybe traders could be interested.
LanguageData.AM_BakingThermometer.label: baking thermometer
LanguageData.AM_BrassLionStatue.description: A lion ornaments made of brass.
LanguageData.AM_BrassLionStatue.label: brass lion statue
LanguageData.AM_BriefCase.description: A leather briefcase from a well-known brand that collectors will love.
LanguageData.AM_BriefCase.label: briefcase
LanguageData.AM_ConfidentialIntelMapA.description: An confidential intelligence map that records a certain location.
LanguageData.AM_ConfidentialIntelMapA.label: confidential intel map
LanguageData.AM_ConfidentialIntelMapB.description: An confidential intelligence map that records a certain location.
LanguageData.AM_ConfidentialIntelMapB.label: confidential intel map
LanguageData.AM_CPU.description: An ancient computer component with specifications completely different from modern devices.
LanguageData.AM_CPU.label: CPU
LanguageData.AM_CreditCard.description: A set of various abandoned credit cards. Unclear whether they can still be used.
LanguageData.AM_CreditCard.label: credit card
LanguageData.AM_DilapidatedMap.description: An dilapidated map that records a certain location.
LanguageData.AM_DilapidatedMap.label: dilapidated map
LanguageData.AM_ElectricalTape.description: A roll of electrical tape,it can be used to repair weapons or equipment
LanguageData.AM_ElectricalTape.label: electrical tape
LanguageData.AM_EmptyBox.label: empty box
LanguageData.AM_GameConsole.description: A strange game console. Internals seem to be fried.
LanguageData.AM_GameConsole.label: game console
LanguageData.AM_GoldenEgg.description: Hollow egg ornaments made of gold.
LanguageData.AM_GoldenEgg.label: golden egg
LanguageData.AM_GoldenRoosterStatue.description: A rooster ornament made of gold.
LanguageData.AM_GoldenRoosterStatue.label: golden rooster statue
LanguageData.AM_GPU.description: An ancient graphics display card. May still be usable.
LanguageData.AM_GPU.label: GPU
LanguageData.AM_HDD.description: Mechanical hard drives used in ancient computers.
LanguageData.AM_HDD.label: HDD
LanguageData.AM_IntelMap.description: An intelligence map that records a certain location.
LanguageData.AM_IntelMap.label: intel map
LanguageData.AM_KeyCard.description: A discarded key card used for an unknown door. May have interest from traders.
LanguageData.AM_KeyCard.label: key card
LanguageData.AM_LEDX.description: A device designed to accurately confirm the position of subcutaneous veins, which is very useful for emergency treatment.
LanguageData.AM_LEDX.label: LEDX
LanguageData.AM_LEGO_GiantRockExcavator_NotOpen.descr: A plastic building block toy for a giant excavator.
LanguageData.AM_LEGO_GiantRockExcavator_NotOpen.label: LEGO giant rock excavator
LanguageData.AM_LEGO_HeavyCrane_NotOpen.description: A plastic building block toy for a heavy crane.
LanguageData.AM_LEGO_HeavyCrane_NotOpen.label: LEGO heavy crane
LanguageData.AM_LEGO_LandmarkBuilding_NotOpen.descrip: A plastic building block toy for a landmark building.
LanguageData.AM_LEGO_LandmarkBuilding_NotOpen.label: LEGO landmark building
LanguageData.AM_LEGO_LightCrane_NotOpen.description: A plastic building block toy for a light crane.
LanguageData.AM_LEGO_LightCrane_NotOpen.label: LEGO light crane
LanguageData.AM_LEGO_MediumCrane_NotOpen.description: A plastic building block toy for a medium crane.
LanguageData.AM_LEGO_MediumCrane_NotOpen.label: LEGO medium crane
LanguageData.AM_LEGO_Palace_NotOpen.description: A plastic building block toy for a palace.
LanguageData.AM_LEGO_Palace_NotOpen.label: LEGO palace
LanguageData.AM_OneLiterGlassAdhesive.description: One tube of glass adhesive, one liter pack,it can be used to repair weapons or equipment
LanguageData.AM_OneLiterGlassAdhesive.label: glass adhesive
LanguageData.AM_PackagedCPU.description: An unopened ancient computer component, once a very rare commodity.
LanguageData.AM_PackagedCPU.label: packaged CPU
LanguageData.AM_PackagedGPU.description: A well packaged ancient graphics display card, brand new.
LanguageData.AM_PackagedGPU.label: packaged GPU
LanguageData.AM_PelvicHammock.description: A clamp for thigh fractures in emergency situations, which needs to be used in conjunction with other items in the medical kit, is not very useful on its own.
LanguageData.AM_PelvicHammock.label: pelvic hammock
LanguageData.AM_RadioIntercom.description: An ancient radio intercom is already out of power.
LanguageData.AM_RadioIntercom.label: radio intercom
LanguageData.AM_SICC.description: A small soft bag used to store various small items such as keycards, banknotes, coins, as well as dog tags and metal keys, popular brands, and loved by collectors.
LanguageData.AM_SICC.label: SICC
LanguageData.AM_SSD.description: A solid-state drive used in ancient computers. Appears to still function.
LanguageData.AM_SSD.label: SSD
LanguageData.AM_TapeMeasure.description: Common tape measures on construction sites.
LanguageData.AM_TapeMeasure.label: tape measure
LanguageData.AM_WayBill.description: A shopping mall supply waybill, maybe it can be used to find the source warehouse.
LanguageData.AM_WayBill.label: way bill
LanguageData.LEGO_GiantRockExcavator_Accomplish.descr: A plastic building block toy for a giant excavator.
LanguageData.LEGO_GiantRockExcavator_Accomplish.label: LEGO giant rock excavator
LanguageData.LEGO_HeavyCrane_Accomplish.description: A plastic building block toy for a heavy crane.
LanguageData.LEGO_HeavyCrane_Accomplish.label: LEGO heavy crane
LanguageData.LEGO_LandmarkBuilding_Accomplish.descrip: A plastic building block toy for a landmark building.
LanguageData.LEGO_LandmarkBuilding_Accomplish.label: LEGO landmark building
LanguageData.LEGO_LightCrane_Accomplish.description: A plastic building block toy for a light crane.
LanguageData.LEGO_LightCrane_Accomplish.label: LEGO light crane
LanguageData.LEGO_MediumCrane_Accomplish.description: A plastic building block toy for a medium crane.
LanguageData.LEGO_MediumCrane_Accomplish.label: LEGO medium crane
LanguageData.LEGO_Palace_Accomplish.description: A plastic building block toy for a palace.
LanguageData.LEGO_Palace_Accomplish.label: LEGO palace
LanguageData.UnfinishedLEGO.label: unfinished lego
